notableEvents.label: Will Wagner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Will Wagner grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Xander Bogaerts out at 2nd. Will Wagner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ty France GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ty France grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Xander Bogaerts out at 2nd. Ty France out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts plunked
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts hit by pitch. Jackson Merrill to 3rd. Gavin Sheets to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Masyn Winn. Manny Machado to 3rd. Gavin Sheets to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Nelson Velázquez batting, Masyn Winn picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Will Wagner.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín flies out to center fielder Jackson Merrill.

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson grounds into a double play, second baseman Sung-Mun Song to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Alec Burleson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Masyn Winn. Manny Machado to 3rd. Gavin Sheets to 2nd.
